NAVAREA XIX 108/21
 1.R/V JOIDES RESOLUTION WILL CONDUCT  A SCIENTIFIC CORING/DRILLING OPERATION IN FOLLOWING POSITIONS:
 A. 65-49.87N 002-01.60E.
 B. 67-18.40N 003-44.24E.
 C. 67-19.84N 003-37.16E.
 D. 68-36.01N 004-38.43E.
 E. 68-45.62N 005-47.69E.
 2. 2NM CLEARANCE IS REQUESTED.
